programs.title: The Perfect Boyfriend
programs.desc: A charming but devious man (Aiden Turner) conspires to bilk a wealthy veterinarian (Ashley Scott) of her money.

programs.title: He's Not Worth Dying For
programs.desc: When Isla and Grace discover that Jake was cheating on them, the girls turn on each other in a jealous rivalry and use their arsenal of social media platforms to badmouth and attack one another.

programs.title: The Wrong Blind Date
programs.desc: After splitting from her controlling husband, a single mother meets a seemingly perfect man who has a dark past and sinister intentions.

programs.title: Match, Meet, Murder
programs.desc: Diving into the world of dating apps, a lingerie designer meets a handsome stranger who's smart, successful, and a former contestant on a dating show. However, she soon learns that the show wasn't the only secret he failed to mention in his profile.

programs.title: Date at Your Own Risk
programs.desc: Eva becomes horrified when she reads an online post where other women accuse her ex-fiance, Will, of harassment and aggressive behavior. When one of the posters mysteriously disappears, she soon starts to wonder if the stories about Will are true.

programs.title: The Dating App Nightmare
programs.desc: Single mom Kate signs up for a dating app with her daughter, Sarah, turning it into a fun bonding moment. But when Sarah goes missing after a date, Kate must navigate the dangerous world they entered together to bring her home safely.
